<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-2_chunk003.pdf#page=25 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-2 p148 -->

RESIDENZ

<!-- header: TRIERZIMME -->


[[File:Band03-2_chunk003_p025_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-2_chunk003_p025_img002.jpg|thumb|II<sub>B</sub> Ius humanum]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-2 p149 -->
